title: Special Intelligence
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Semtin_Sixtus_Septaas.jpg|thumb|right|300px|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Marl Semtin/Legends|Marl Semtin]] with two Special Intelligence Operatives.]]
{{Quote|Sixtus Quin was a Special Intelligence Operative who was betrayed by his Imperial commander, so he helped us out in a mission on Tatooine.|[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]], about [[Sixtus Quin]]|<ref name="X-Wing: The Bacta War">''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]''</ref>}}
'''Special Intelligence''' was an elite branch of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]], and had a reputation for carrying out especially clandestine or unsavory missions.

==Members==

*[[Sixtus Quin]]
*[[Septaas]]
*[[Vaartsoon]]
